title: CLUB HOPE - 211info
text: CLUB HOPE CLUB HOPE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a recovery drop-in center with support services for substance addiction, including support groups and an employment center. Additional services include laundry facilities, showers, and snacks. Services are available for individuals at any stage of recovery. 100 SE Cleveland Avenue Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Drop-In Center: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Showers and laundry: Monday-Friday 10am-3pm Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Job Finding Assistance * Substance Use Disorder Issues Laundry Facilities Public Showers/Baths Substance Use Disorder Drop In Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CLUB HOPE
